name: ux-pgm-skills
description: UX PgM Skills Collection: structured AI workflows for running design programs. Domain-specific skills and chained workflows across 6 plugins — from program planning to stakeholder comms, delivery, cross-functional alignment, measurement, and process design.

plugins.name: program-planning
plugins.description: Plan and scope UX programs: roadmaps, dependency maps, scoping, capacity planning, and transparent prioritisation.

plugins.name: stakeholder-comms
plugins.description: Communicate with stakeholders: mapping, status reporting, executive updates, alignment workshops, and escalation.

plugins.name: delivery-execution
plugins.description: Drive delivery: cycle orchestration, risk registers, blocker triage, launch readiness, and retrospectives.

plugins.name: cross-functional-alignment
plugins.description: Keep design, product, and engineering aligned: intake, decision logs, working agreements, RACI, and OKR linkage.

plugins.name: measurement-ops
plugins.description: Measure program health: KPIs, health dashboards, research ops coordination, design ops metrics, and impact reporting.

plugins.name: process-design
plugins.description: Design how the team works: workflows, governance, rituals, scaling playbooks, and process retrospectives.
